title: ajax minor var. altior
intro: Ajax minor var. altior, also known as Ajuga reptans, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the mint family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Ajax minor var. altior include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to boost the immune system and reduce stress. It can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
